decision.promptSubtitle: Describe the trip you're dreaming of — a vibe, a budget, a season, whatever's in your head. We'll suggest a few places worth deciding between.
decision.promptPlaceholder: A relaxed week somewhere warm in March, mid-budget, love food and old towns…
decision.confirmDatesSubtitle: Pick your dates and we'll build the full itinerary.
decision.error: Something went wrong finding options. Give it another try.

datePicker.maxDaysHint: Select dates for your trip (max {days} days)

step1.title: Where and when?
step1.subtitle: Pick a destination and your travel dates
step1.startAnywhereTitle: Start from an image or URL
step1.startAnywhereSubtitle: Got a photo, screenshot, or travel blog? We'll figure out the destination.
step1.dateHelp: Select dates for your trip (max 14 days)

returningUser.subtitle: You already have trips saved. Want to continue where you left off?

step2.title: Set your travel style
step2.subtitle: Pick your vibe for {destination}— we'll tailor your itinerary

step3.title: What's your travel vibe?
step3.subtitle: Choose the mood that captures your ideal {destination} experience

step4.title: Final details
step4.subtitle: Set your budget, pace, and any special requirements

adventure.label: Adventure Seeker
adventure.description: Outdoor activities, hiking trails, and adrenaline-pumping experiences

cultural.label: Cultural Explorer
cultural.description: Museums, heritage sites, local traditions, and historical wonders

foodie.label: Food & Wine
foodie.description: Local cuisine, food tours, markets, and culinary experiences

wellness.label: Wellness & Relaxation
wellness.description: Spas, yoga retreats, peaceful gardens, and rejuvenating experiences

romantic.label: Romantic Getaway
romantic.description: Scenic spots, sunset views, intimate dining, and couple activities

urban.label: Urban Explorer
urban.description: City life, shopping districts, nightlife, and modern attractions

nature.label: Nature Lover
nature.description: Parks, gardens, scenic landscapes, and wildlife encounters

offbeat.label: Off the Beaten Path
offbeat.description: Hidden gems, local secrets, and unconventional experiences

time-traveler.label: Time Traveler
time-traveler.description: Ancient ruins, medieval castles, and historical landmarks

photo-hunter.label: Photo Hunter
photo-hunter.description: Instagram-worthy spots, viewpoints, and photogenic locations

local-life.label: Local Life
local-life.description: Neighborhoods, local cafes, markets, and authentic experiences

night-owl.label: Night Owl
night-owl.description: Evening entertainment, bars, clubs, and late-night food

budget.label: Budget
budget.description: Free attractions, street food, public transport

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Mix of experiences, local restaurants, some tours

requirements.title: Special Requirements
requirements.placeholder: e.g., wheelchair accessible, vegetarian restaurants, kid-friendly...
requirements.hint: Optional - tell us about any specific needs

generation.error: Failed to generate itinerary. Please try again.
generation.errorTimeout: The request took too long. This can happen with complex trips — please try again.
generation.errorNetwork: Connection issue. Please check your internet and try again.
generation.errorServerBusy: Our AI is taking longer than usual right now. Please try again in a moment — or try a shorter trip.

ongoing.allActivitiesCompleted: You've completed all activities for today

detail.noItineraryMessage: This trip doesn't have any activities planned yet.
detail.tripUpdated: Your trip has been updated successfully.
detail.aiGeneratedDescription: This itinerary was created by AI and enriched with real-time data from Google Places.
detail.clickMoreInfo: Click "More" on any activity to see verified details and photos.
detail.editModeInstructions: Drag to reorder, tap to edit, or use the menu to delete activities. Click the green checkmark button above when done.
detail.suggestActivity: + Suggest an activity for this day
detail.proposalSubmitted: Proposal submitted! Other travelers will vote on it.

editActivity.deleteConfirmMessage: "{name}" will be removed from your itinerary.

addActivity.title: Add Activity
addActivity.searchOrSelect: Search for activities or select a category

limits.noTripsRemaining: You've used all your free trips
limits.joinWaitlist: Join the waitlist for early access

save.title: Save Your Trip
save.subtitle: Create an account to save and access your trip anytime
save.error: Failed to save trip. Please try again.

startOver.title: Start Over?
startOver.message: This will discard your current itinerary and start fresh.

template.noItineraryMessage: This template doesn't have any activities yet.
template.curatedDescription: This itinerary has been carefully crafted with the best experiences, restaurants, and hidden gems. Save it to your account to customize dates, swap activities, and make it your own.
template.saveAndSetDates: Save it to your account and set your travel dates

seasonalContext.rainyDays: ~{count, plural, one {# rainy day} other {# rainy days}} expected
seasonalContext.vibesHint: These are suggestions based on the season. Select your vibes in the next step.

vibeReasons.christmas: Perfect for Christmas markets and winter wonderland vibes
vibeReasons.spring: Cherry blossoms and spring blooms await
vibeReasons.autumnFoodie: Harvest season with amazing local produce
vibeReasons.autumnRetro: Cozy vintage cafes and autumn colors
vibeReasons.winter: Perfect for spa retreats and cozy escapes

weatherFallback.tropicalWet: Wet season with afternoon showers, humid
weatherFallback.spring: Mild temperatures, occasional rain, blooming flowers
weatherFallback.summer: Warm to hot, long days, peak sunshine
weatherFallback.autumn: Cool temperatures, crisp air, colorful foliage
weatherFallback.winter: Cold temperatures, possible snow, shorter days
